# Service Contract

## Service Records

### Planned Demo

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Exposure state | `planned` |
| Route identifier | `planned-demo` |
| Service name | `Planned Demo` |
| Runtime | `unknown` |
| Host or cluster placement | `unknown` |
| Public host or port | `unknown` |
| Protocol | `unknown` |
| Proxy or direct-port routing | `unknown` |
| Internal target | `unknown` |
| Firewall intent | `planned` |
| Secret dependency | `none` |
| Review notes | `Planned fixture route; not active production exposure.` |
